Edinburgh is one of the most atmospheric cities in Europe. 🏴✨ Capital of Scotland, it’s a city shaped by medieval streets, volcanic hills, dramatic viewpoints and centuries of history. Its Old Town and New Town are both part of a UNESCO World Heritage Site, showing two very different sides of the city: the dark, narrow closes of the Old Town and the elegant Georgian architecture of the New Town. The castle dominates the skyline from Castle Rock, while the Royal Mile connects some of the most historic parts of the city. Around every corner you find stone façades, hidden courtyards, old pubs, bookshops and viewpoints that make Edinburgh feel almost cinematic. Places like Victoria Street, Dean Village, Calton Hill, The Vennel and Circus Lane show why this city is so special: it’s not just beautiful, it has character. Edinburgh is moody, elegant, literary, historic and unforgettable — one of those places that feels different from anywhere else in the UK. 🖤 #Edinburgh #Scotland #VisitScotland #EdinburghCastle #EuropeTravel

Here is my go to shot list for a cinematic sequence! 🎥 Super simple but very effective! Having multiple angles and viewpoints of the same action unfolding is really important and helps to tell a story.  Here is the list broken down for ease:  1. THE CLOSE UP: start tight, introduce detail first not context. This creates curiosity and a reverse storytelling effect as the scene unfolds!  2. THE ACTION SHOT: show what’s happening. Focus on the process, movement, or craft because this is where the story feels alive.  3. THE SUBJECT SHOT: who is this about? This shot grounds the story in a person and shows the technique, skill, identity and intention.  4. THE MID SHOT: start opening up the environment. It bridges the subject and space, helping the viewer feel present and in the moment.  5. THE RESULT SHOT: revealing the outcome. This is where the viewer can understand what was being made, how and why it matters.  6. THE WIDE SHOT: End with context. Show the full environment, this completes the visual story.  To really elevate your sequence, if you had the opportunity to interview the person you’re filming, they could do a voice over!  I hope these shots are useful for any beginners, there are lots of other ways to shoot a sequence but this is my go to!  Happy filming!! 🎬  @Sony Alpha @Adobe @Sony @Visit Vietnam

#UNSACDEBILLES | Un sac de billes (A Bag of Marbles) is a historical drama based on the true story of Joseph Joffo and his family during World War II. The story follows two Jewish brothers, Joseph and Maurice, who live in Paris during the Nazi occupation of France. When the situation becomes dangerous for Jewish families, their parents send them away to the Free Zone in southern France to escape persecution. During their journey, the boys face many challenges and dangers. They must hide their Jewish identity, travel alone, and rely on their courage, intelligence, and determination to survive. Along the way, they meet both kind people who help them and others who threaten them. Their greatest hope is to stay alive and reunite with their family. The film highlights themes of family, bravery, survival, and the impact of war on children. It shows how the two brothers overcome fear and adversity while trying to remain together. #fyp #patrickbruel #capcut #shoah

The Great Pyramid of Giza is the largest in Egypt. One of the most famous structures in the world, it attracts a record number of travelers to the country, including Russians. 15 million people visit Egypt annually. We'll reveal interesting facts about the history of the Great Pyramid's construction and some of the secrets of its design. The Purpose of the Great Pyramid of Giza The ancient Egyptians believed that after death, a person goes to the afterlife, where they continue to live as before, only slightly better: the poor become rich, and the ruler gains even greater power. However, this wasn't always the case: researchers believe that initially, only the pharaoh, who was considered a god, had the right to an afterlife. After death, he could also bestow this right on his subjects. Star Wars is the celebrated science fiction media franchise created by George Lucas. The main saga comprises nine films, divided into three trilogies (the original, prequels, and sequels). The universe has also expanded with standalone films and numerous television series, such as The Mandalorian. #pyramids #egipt #sphinx #starwars #animation

Khán giả thoát video vì Nhịp độ thị giác (Visual Pacing) của bạn quá phẳng  Thuật toán không tự nhiên đẩy video lên xu hướng, nó ưu tiên những thước phim biết cách thao túng Tải trọng nhận thức (mình lấy khái niệm của thiết kế UI/UX) . Sai lầm của 90% người làm short-form là dùng B-roll (cảnh trám) như một "miếng dán" để chắp vá vấp thoại. Trong Tâm lý học Thần kinh, khi khán giả nhìn một góc máy tĩnh quá 5 giây, não bộ sẽ tự động bật cơ chế "Thích nghi giác quan" — hình ảnh của bạn lập tức biến thành tiếng ồn trắng, và ngón tay họ sẽ vuốt đi để tìm kiếm lượng Dopamine mới. Thay vì quay phim kiểu tự phát, đây là Bản đồ 7 Cấp độ Broll được chắt lọc từ Ngữ pháp Điện ảnh (Cinematic Grammar). Nó không sinh ra để lấp chỗ trống, nó là công cụ giải phóng áp lực cho não bộ: Chúng ta dùng Sequence để băm nhỏ chuyển động tạo cú sốc thị giác (Dopamine Reset), dùng POV để đi xuyên qua màng lọc phòng thủ  và dùng Negative Space (Khoảng trống) để ép tiềm thức đóng gói thông tin. Để 7 quy tắc hàn lâm này dễ nhớ  mỗi khi viết kịch bản, hãy nằm lòng câu Khẩu quyết Lục Bát sau:  🎬 "Cutaway hình khớp từng lời,  Sequence băm nhịp liên hồi đẩy lên.  POV mượn mắt kề bên,  In-situ bối cảnh xây nền niềm tin.  Intercut luân chuyển góc nhìn,  Metaphor ẩn dụ gài hình cắm sâu.  Khoảng lặng chốt nhịp hồi lâu,  Bảy tầng cảnh trám in sâu vào đầu!" 📌 Đừng để kịch bản hay chết chìm trong góc máy tẻ nhạt. Nhấn LƯU NGAY mật mã này để đưa tư duy của bạn từ "nghiệp dư" lên chuẩn "pờ rồ" vào ngày mai! #NguPhapThiGiac #TuDuy #TamLyHocHanhVi #RetentionRate #KichBanVideo
